title: Centralisation and decentralisation
summary: 9609 A Level — where decisions are made in the hierarchy.
learningObjectives: Apply to multinational and growing firms.

simpleExplanation.title: Head office vs local choice
simpleExplanation.summary: Centralised decisions come from top management; decentralised pushes authority to branches or divisions closer to customers.

sections.content: **Centralisation** (7.1.5) pairs with **7.1.3 delegation**. Large **MNC cases** often test this.
